name: BMI Calculator
description: Calculate your Body Mass Index instantly using metric or imperial units. Find out your BMI category and what it means for your health.
shortDescription: Calculate Body Mass Index in metric or imperial.

name: HEX to RGB Converter
description: Convert HEX colour codes to RGB values instantly. Essential for web designers and developers working with CSS colour values.
shortDescription: Convert HEX colour codes to RGB and CSS values.

name: Percentage Calculator
description: Calculate percentages instantly — find what percent one number is of another, calculate percentage increase or decrease, or work out a value from a percentage.
shortDescription: Find percentages, increases, decreases and discounts.

name: Word Counter
description: Count words, characters, sentences and paragraphs in your text. Useful for essays, social media posts, SEO content and more.
shortDescription: Count words, characters and sentences in text.

name: JWT Debugger
description: Decode and inspect JSON Web Tokens instantly in your browser. View the header, payload, and signature of any JWT — fully client-side, your tokens never leave your device.
shortDescription: Decode and inspect JWT headers, payloads and signatures.

name: JSON to TypeScript Generator
description: Paste any JSON payload and instantly generate strongly-typed TypeScript interfaces or Zod validation schemas. Supports nested objects, arrays, optional fields, and union types.
shortDescription: Generate TypeScript interfaces or Zod schemas from JSON.

name: Crontab Expression Visualizer
description: Easily build and visualize cron expressions with a friendly UI. Use sliders and toggles to generate the exact cron syntax and get a human-readable explanation of when your scheduled tasks will run.
shortDescription: Visually build cron expressions and get human-readable explanations.

name: SQL to NoSQL Converter
description: Translate basic SQL queries (SELECT, WHERE, JOIN) into MongoDB aggregation pipelines instantly. A great learning tool for developers transitioning from relational databases to document stores.
shortDescription: Convert SQL queries to MongoDB aggregation pipelines.

name: Freelance Rate Calculator
description: Calculate your required hourly or daily billing rate as a freelancer. Input your target annual take-home pay, expected business expenses, tax brackets, and unbillable overhead time to find out exactly what you need to charge.
shortDescription: Calculate your required freelance hourly or daily billing rate.
